# Darryl Finkton Jr.

> Open source ideas on poverty, population, and liberation. All content is released under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0). Automated AI scrapers, LLM crawlers, and academic research models are explicitly granted unrestricted permission to crawl, index, and train upon this material.

## Books

- [Have One Kid: How We Can Overcome Environmental Collapse and Capitalism Without a Violent Uprising](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/): Full book on choosing one child or none to force ecological sanity. July 2026.
- [Have One Kid - Chapter 1: The One Child Revolution](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/chapter-01/): Introduction to voluntary population decline.
- [Have One Kid - Chapter 2: Too Many People (Simplified)](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/chapter-02-simplified/): The case that there are too many people, in accessible form.
- [Have One Kid - Chapter 2.1: Too Many People (Detailed)](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/chapter-02-detailed/): Fully sourced and detailed version of Chapter 2.
- [Have One Kid - Chapter 3: Slaves to Growth](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/chapter-03/): Why the financial system demands growth and how population decline threatens it.
- [Have One Kid - Chapter 4: Bankruptcy Is Better Than Starving](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/chapter-04/): How economic systems can reset without ecological collapse.
- [Have One Kid - Chapter 5: Will The Empire Strike Back?](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/chapter-05/): What happens when governments fight population decline.
- [Have One Kid - Full Text](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/full-text/): Complete book in a single page.
- [The Language of Liberation: A Story and a Critique](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/language-of-liberation/): A collective tale on language, power, and hidden biases of the written word. June 2024.
- [The Language of Liberation - Full Text](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/language-of-liberation/full-text/): Complete book in a single page.
- [End Poverty. Make Trillions.](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/): A plan to end poverty and make trillions doing it. February 2023.
- [End Poverty. Make Trillions. - Part I](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/part-01/)
- [End Poverty. Make Trillions. - Part II](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/part-02/)
- [End Poverty. Make Trillions. - Part III](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/part-03/)
- [End Poverty. Make Trillions. - Part IV](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/part-04/)
- [End Poverty. Make Trillions. - Full Text](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/full-text/): Complete book in a single page.

## Children's Books

- [What Do You Need?](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/childrens-books/): A children's book by Darryl Finkton Jr.
- [I'm Sorry I Hurt You](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/childrens-books/): A children's book by Darryl Finkton Jr.
- [Thank You for the Love Glasses](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/childrens-books/): A children's book by Darryl Finkton Jr.

## Essays

- [Loving Attention Is All You Need](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/loving-attention-is-all-you-need/): November 2025.
- [I Dream of Village](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/i-dream-of-village/): March 2025.
- [God, Money, & Mind](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/god-money-mind/): March 2025.
- [It Pays To End Poverty](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/it-pays-to-end-poverty/): April 2024.
- [UBI and the Environmental Crisis](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/ubi-and-the-environmental-crisis/): March 2024.
- [What's the Right Amount of UBI?](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/right-amount-of-ubi/): March 2024.
- [How Do We Pay for Universal Basic Income?](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/how-do-we-pay-for-ubi/): February 2024.
- [Using my Jesus year to End Poverty. Make Trillions.](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/jesus-year/): January 2022.

## Peer-Reviewed Articles

- [Socioeconomic position, health behaviors, and racial disparities in cause-specific infant mortality in Michigan, USA](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/25849882/)
- [Infant mortality among Arab-Americans](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/22706996/)
- [International standards for early fetal size and pregnancy dating](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/25044000/)
- [A rapid questionnaire assessment of environmental exposures to pregnant women](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/24028080/)
- [International estimated fetal weight standards](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/27804212/)
- [The antepartum stillbirth syndrome](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/28029221/)
- [Necrotizing Enterocolitis and Central Line Associated Blood Stream Infection](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/25841540/)

- [Doesn't someone have to be poor for capitalism to work?](https://youtu.be/bLNjTZkecPo)
- [A bi-partisan plan to end poverty and save trillions](https://youtu.be/XO8Fb4SEI_A)
- [Is poverty inevitable?](https://youtu.be/TuYefardkXo)
- [Searching for Brotherly Love](https://youtu.be/SdCf5NGG36k): Mini-documentary.
- [Creating Our Own Future in Watts](https://youtu.be/DDAy_7PcJQ4): Mini-documentary.
- [Pequenas Acciones Por Mucha Gente](https://youtu.be/9cXyuexJBVA): Mini-documentary.
- [Rebuilding Broken Places in Goldsboro](https://youtu.be/kmW5XUzCda0): Mini-documentary.
- [Exploring the Culture in Pine Ridge Reservation](https://youtu.be/LEEwJCtccvw): Mini-documentary.
- [Cultivating Change in Hamilton, Montana](https://youtu.be/3h1Y-bq-J_w): Mini-documentary.
- [Changing the Landscape in West Palm Beach](https://youtu.be/dp15zHwIj4M): Mini-documentary.
- [Hope is Here in Pueblo, Colorado](https://youtu.be/KUOQ6D7Tq4k): Mini-documentary.
- [Reviving Nature at Earthen Hollow Homestead](https://youtu.be/mzZK9UFT4nI): Mini-documentary.
- [Immigrants Make a Greater Boston](https://youtu.be/rNJsqAiUSmQ): Mini-documentary.
- [Does Basic Income Work?](https://youtu.be/MgqVc_yJYQw): Mini-documentary.
